name: Mount Pleasant Community Development Corp. Inc
description_short: Non-profit community development corporation in Monroe, LA focused on empowering families through affordable housing solutions and community support services.
description_long:
Mt. Pleasant Community Development Corp. Inc. is a non-profit organization based in Monroe, Louisiana, serving the local community through affordable housing initiatives and family empowerment programs. Founded with a mission centered on housing accessibility, the organization operates as a community development corporation dedicated to improving quality of life for families in the Monroe area. The organization is listed as a member of the Monroe Chamber of Commerce, indicating local business and community integration.

Mt. Pleasant CDC offers affordable housing solutions as their primary service offering, with a stated focus on empowering families through improved access to stable, affordable housing. Their work centers on community development and family support rather than credit repair or financial lending. The organization maintains regular business hours Monday through Thursday 9am-5pm and Friday 9am-3pm to serve community members.

The organization distinguishes itself through its non-profit status and community-focused mission, specifically targeting families seeking housing solutions rather than operating as a commercial lending entity. Their presence in the Monroe community and Chamber of Commerce membership suggests established local relationships and credibility within the area. The emphasis on affordable housing solutions positions them within the community development sector rather than traditional consumer finance.

Based on available website information, Mt. Pleasant CDC appears to be a legitimate non-profit housing-focused organization serving Monroe families. However, the website provides limited operational details about specific programs, eligibility requirements, or housing solutions offered. Prospective clients should contact the organization directly via phone at (318) 323-3632 or visit their full website at mtpleasantcdc.org for comprehensive information about available housing programs and services.
pros: Non-profit organization with community development focus rather than for-profit lending model
Established local presence in Monroe, LA with Chamber of Commerce membership
Regular, accessible business hours Monday-Friday for community engagement
Specific mission-driven focus on affordable housing solutions for families
Multiple contact methods available including phone and social media presence
Staff available during standard business hours for direct consultation
cons: Website provides minimal details about specific housing programs or eligibility criteria
Limited information on application processes, timelines, or program outcomes
Service area appears limited to Monroe, LA region with no indication of broader availability
No documentation of HUD certification, NFCC membership, or other formal credentials visible on website
Website lacks detailed FAQs, program descriptions, or financial counseling resources
best_for: Monroe, LA families seeking affordable housing assistance and community support
Individuals interested in community development housing initiatives in Northeast Louisiana
Families wanting direct interaction with a local non-profit rather than national organizations
diagnosis: Mt. Pleasant CDC is best for Monroe, LA families seeking non-profit affordable housing solutions and community support. The main caveat is that the website offers limited program details—prospective clients must contact them directly at (318) 323-3632 or mtpleasantcdc.org to understand specific services, eligibility, and current housing programs available.
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
